result: The raw survey datasets have been cleaned and preprocessed according to the provided specifications. The R script loaded the tab-delimited files from `data/input/`, merged them using `full_join` on the `NSID` variable, and handled potential many-to-many relationship issues by ensuring uniqueness of IDs. Marital status variables from waves 6, 8, and 9 were harmonized into both collapsed categories for temporal comparison and detailed adult versions to preserve granularity. Missing value codes were standardized (e.g., mapping wave-specific codes like -997, -97 to standard codes -2, -7, and Nulls to -3). The final processed dataset containing the ID and derived variables was saved as a CSV file at `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`.
